title: LEGO Mario Kart – Mario & Standard Kart - Nintendo Character Display Figure & Car Model Kit for Gaming Fans - 72037
features: LEGO Super Mario set for adults – Show off your love for Mario Kart with this brick-built model kit featuring Mario in his Standard Kart, great for display and gaming-room decor
Designed for dynamic display – The Super Mario figure has a posable head and arms, and the stand allows you to display the Standard Kart at dynamic angles as if it is drifting or being driven fast
An immersive building set for adults – A creative project for advanced LEGO builders, this model kit comes with step-by-step instructions so even LEGO newcomers can enjoy the experience
Super Mario decor idea – This build-and-display LEGO Super Mario set adds a fun, creative touch to any Super Mario fan’s room, gaming setup or office space
Collectible gift for adults – Treat yourself or surprise a Super Mario fan with this buildable Mario Kart LEGO model kit, a great gift for men, women and adult gamers
LEGO Builder app – Download the app for intuitive 3D building instructions, with tools to zoom, rotate your model, track progress, and enhance your LEGO building experience
LEGO Super Mario collectible – Part of a wide range of LEGO sets for adults, this building kit offers a hands-on, creative activity for fans who enjoy relaxing through mindful building
description: From the manufacturer Dynamic LEGO Super Mario display model Show your passion for Mario Kart races with this LEGO brick-built figure of Mario in his Standard Kart. Detailed building set for adults Create a super display with a posable Mario figure sitting behind the wheel of the most iconic Mario Kart vehicle of all. LEGO Super Mario: Mario Kart – Mario & Standard Kart Posable Mario figure Pose Mario’s head and arms as he sits in the Standard Kart. Buildable stand Display the Standard Kart at dynamic angles. LEGO Super Mario decor A fun addition to any adult fan’s room decor. An immersive, joyful building experience Take time out to enjoy a fun creative challenge, using LEGO bricks to capture the look of Mario and his vehicle. LEGO Super Mario gift for adults and kids This build-and-display set is a brilliant gamer gift idea for men, women and any Mario Kart fans.
